aeo_readiness.summary: While TemperaturePro has a strong foundation with decent content and good NAP consistency, it lacks the structured data and conversational depth needed for AI assistants to prioritize them in search results.
quick_wins: Implement LocalBusiness schema markup with detailed business information.
Expand FAQ content to address common HVAC queries and optimize for voice search.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-optimized with a high rating, numerous photos, and accurate contact information.
critical_issues: No recent posts or updates on GBP.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected across platforms.
action_items: Regularly audit citations to ensure ongoing accuracy.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for common HVAC tasks

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content limits AI model citations.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to 'HVAC repair near me' and 'best HVAC services in Round Rock'.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Adding LocalBusiness schema and expanding FAQ content.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Positioning as HVAC experts by publishing detailed guides and obtaining certifications.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by optimizing for the new search landscape.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, TemperaturePro misses out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Competitors with structured data and conversational content rank higher in AI search results.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates structured data, expands conversational content, and enhances GBP engagement to boost AI visibility.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within 3-6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Waiting means losing ground to competitors who are already optimizing for AI search.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Growth for TemperaturePro: Act Now!
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to enhance your AI search visibility.
cta: Let's discuss how we can optimize your online presence for AI assistants and drive more leads.
page_title: Leading Round Rock HVAC Services | TemperaturePro
